query: SELECT streamUrl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM radio_channels WHERE status = 'active' GROUP BY streamUrl HAVING cnt > 1
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zpoeP3x1cmc7iMR.f2a79e44485f --database eSHiAmKDzW4pqcyH7Ttb7c --execute SELECT streamUrl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM radio_channels WHERE status = 'active' GROUP BY streamUrl HAVING cnt > 1
